Equal Employment Opportunity

Data successfully submitted

Equal Employment Opportunity
At the Adecco Group, we are committed to making the future work for everyone.
Your input is fully optional and voluntary, but we would appreciate it. The information you provide will not be used in the hiring decision making process and will not be accessed by selecting or hiring individuals.
This information will be kept confidentially, maintained separately from your application and only be used in accordance with applicable laws. You can select "Prefer not to say" if you prefer not to answer.
As a people business focused on providing talent solutions and advisory services, we envision a world in which everyone has the chance to participate in the world of work.
We seek to foster a culture of belonging and purpose, an environment where everyone can thrive and feel engaged, and where difference is respected and valued. We believe our commitment and active drive to improve everyone’s chances of being part of the world of work is both a critical business advantage and a non-negotiable, integral part of who we are.
We believe in talent, not labels, and focus on the diverse and unique skills our people bring. We work actively to create the conditions that support a culture and work environment of belonging, trust and participation. We will continue to challenge ourselves and others, push boundaries, and strive to be at the forefront of delivering better futures for all. And we will not rest until the future works for everyone.

Data Privacy Statement

At the Adecco Group we take your privacy seriously. Our Privacy Information Statement defines how we process your personal information when applying to a role with us. By selecting “I agree” you confirm that you have read, understood and agree with the processing of your personal information as described in the Statement (click here to read more). (Required)

Read the whole Data Privacy Statement

Willing to join our global talent community? When opportunity knocks make sure you hear it! By selecting "I agree" you consent to receive communications and automatic email job alerts from the Adecco Group. Please select “I don’t agree” if you are not interested.

Read the whole Data Privacy Statement - Talent Database
